complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.系统的检测能力由一组深度学习模型驱动。本章介绍如何管理这些模型与其训练数据集：包: The system's inspection capability is driven by a set of deep-learning models. This chapter covers managing those models and their training datasets — viewing, uploading, and switching models; importing and exporting datasets; reviewing training distributions; and starting training runs.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.模型有两个入口：: Models are reached from two places:
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**设置 → 管理模型**：模型清单与生命周期操作（设为默认、重命名、导出、删除: **Settings → Manage Models**: the model inventory and its lifecycle actions (Set as Default, Rename, Export, Delete, and so on).
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**模型页面（Models）**：以数据集为中心的视图，用于标注训练样本、查看训: **Models page**: a dataset-centric view for labelling training samples, reviewing the train / test distribution, and starting training.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.在 **设置** 左侧点击 **管理模型**，可按 **全部 / 预训练 / 已: Click **Manage Models** on the left of **Settings** and filter the inventory by **All / Pre-trained / Trained**.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**上传模型**：导入外部训练好的模型文件。: **Upload Model**: import a model file trained elsewhere.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**训练模型**：跳转到模型页面，基于当前数据集发起一次训练。: **Train Model**: jump to the Models page and start a training run against the current dataset.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**设为默认**：将某模型设为对应检测类型的默认推理模型。: **Set as Default**: make a model the default inference model for its inspection type.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**重命名**：修改模型条目的显示名称。: **Rename**: change the model entry's display name.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**导出...**：将模型文件导出到本地。: **Export…**: export the model file to local storage.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**删除**：从系统中移除该模型。: **Delete**: remove the model from the system.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**导入数据集 / 导出数据集**：在不同环境间迁移训练样本。: **Import / Export Dataset**: move training samples between environments.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**重置初始图片**：将数据集恢复到初始样本集合。: **Reset Initial Images**: restore the dataset to the initial sample set.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.模型页面位于导航栏 **Models**，左侧图标栏提供两个视图切换：: The Models page lives under the **Models** nav entry; the icon strip on the left switches between two views:
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**数据集**：查看、标注和管理训练样本。: **Dataset**: view, label, and manage training samples.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**训练**：配置训练参数、发起训练并查看训练结果。: **Training**: configure training parameters, start training, and review training results.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.模型数据集与训练界面示意: Models page — dataset and training views
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**数据集** 视图展示当前检测类型已积累的所有训练样本（来自自动编程、评估与现: The **Dataset** view shows every training sample accumulated for the current inspection type — from Auto-Programming, from evaluation, and from on-line feedback.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**导出数据集**：将当前数据集打包导出为 .zip 文件，用于在不同环境间迁移: **Export Dataset**: bundle the current dataset into a ``.zip`` for migration or backup.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**导入数据集**：从本地 .zip 文件导入样本，合并到当前数据集。: **Import Dataset**: import samples from a local ``.zip`` and merge them into the current dataset.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**查看训练/测试分布**：切换右侧面板的显示，查看 **训练集** 与 **测: **View Train / Test Distribution**: switch the right panel to show the **Training set** and **Test set** sample counts and ratios. The training set includes train and val samples; the test set holds test samples. The percentage next to each number reflects the proportion among currently-labelled samples.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**训练模型**：跳转到训练视图，发起模型训练。: **Train Model**: switch to the Training view and start a training run.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.数据集视图：图像库、右侧训练 / 测试分布面板与顶部按钮: Dataset view: image library, train / test distribution panel on the right, and the top toolbar.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.切换到 **训练** 视图后，界面分为左侧 **训练设置** 面板与右侧 **摘: In the **Training** view, the layout splits into the **Training Settings** panel on the left and the **Summary** panel on the right, with the **Dataset** sample library at the bottom (its height is drag-resizable).
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.左侧面板顶部可在 **训练** 与 **测试** 子标签之间切换（用于筛选下方标: The top of the left panel toggles between **Training** and **Test** sub-tabs (which filter the label-statistics table below). The table lists the count of each label in the training set, the test set, and the unassigned bucket:
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.右侧面板展示已选模型针对当前数据集的 **混淆矩阵** （Confusion M: The right panel shows the **confusion matrix** for the selected model against the current dataset. Rows are actual labels and columns are model predictions; the diagonal cells (green) are correct predictions; off-diagonal cells (red) are mispredictions. If no model has been trained yet, the panel shows a hint.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.面板底部的 **开始训练** 按钮用于发起训练（见下节训练流程）。: The **Start Training** button at the bottom of the panel kicks off training (see *Training flow* below).
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.训练视图：训练设置面板（标签统计）、摘要面板（混淆矩阵）与开始训练按钮: Training view: Training Settings panel (label stats), Summary panel (confusion matrix), and Start Training button.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.在 **数据集** 视图或 **训练** 视图中确认已积累足够且类别均衡的样本。: In the **Dataset** or **Training** view, confirm that enough samples have been accumulated and that the classes are reasonably balanced.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.（可选）点击 **查看训练/测试分布**，确认各类别样本数量合理，避免某一类别样: (Optional) Click **View Train / Test Distribution** and verify that each class has a reasonable sample count — overfitting follows when one class is very thin.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.在训练视图底部点击 **开始训练** 按钮。系统弹出 **为模型命名** 对话框: Click **Start Training** at the bottom of the Training view. The **Name new model** dialog opens; enter a model name and click **Start Training** to confirm.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.训练开始后，界面切换到 **训练进度** 视图，展示：: Once training begins, the UI switches to the **Training Progress** view, which shows:
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.当前 Epoch 进度与预计剩余时间。: Current epoch progress and the estimated time remaining.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.实时 **准确率** 与 **最佳** （best）准确率及进度条。: Live **accuracy** and **best** accuracy with progress bars.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**训练图表**：准确率曲线（Accuracy）与训练/验证损失曲线（Train: **Training charts**: the accuracy curve and the training / validation loss curves.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**停止训练** 按钮：点击后系统在当前 Epoch 完成评估后终止训练，并保留: **Stop Training** button: clicking it stops the run after the current epoch's evaluation completes; the system keeps the model weights from the best-accuracy epoch.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.**返回模板** 按钮：退出训练进度视图，返回设置面板（训练仍在后台继续）。: **Back to Template** button: exits the training-progress view and returns to the settings panel (training continues in the background).
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.训练完成后，可在 **管理模型** 中将新模型 **设为默认**，使其在后续检测: Once training finishes, head to **Manage Models** and click **Set as Default** on the new model to apply it to subsequent inspections.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.反馈写入数据集后，建议在稳定的光照与工艺条件下积累一段时间样本再训练，避免短期波: After feedback is written to the dataset, let samples accumulate under stable lighting and process conditions for a while before retraining; otherwise short-term fluctuations can overfit the model.
complete_user_guide/system_management/mo.训练完成后，当前运行的检测会话不会自动切换到新模型。需在 **管理模型** 中执: When training finishes, the running inspection session does NOT switch to the new model automatically. **Set as Default** on **Manage Models** and restart the session to pick the new model up.

support/faq.po.在某些设备上，如果连续使用模型推理，执行速度非常快（例如 10 毫秒以内）；但如: On some machines, back-to-back model inference is very fast (under 10 ms), but when two inference calls are spaced apart (more than ~5 seconds), the second call can be significantly slower (over 100 ms) before returning to the normal ~10 ms.
support/faq.po.这是由于 GPU 进入低功耗状态导致的性能下降问题。: The slowdown comes from the GPU dropping into a low-power state between calls.
support/faq.po.为了保证您的设备始终以高性能运行，建议您进行以下设置：: To keep the machine running at full performance, apply these settings:
support/faq.po.找到 Power management mode，设置为 Prefer maxi: Find **Power management mode** and set it to **Prefer maximum performance**.
support/faq.po.在编程一个元件数量较多的 PCB 模板时，浏览器可能会出现卡顿现象。建议开启浏览: Programming a PCB template with many components can make the browser stutter. Enable browser hardware acceleration for a smoother experience.
support/faq.po.点击右上角“...” → “设置”: Click the *…* menu at the top right → **Settings**.
support/faq.po.左侧选择“系统和性能”: Pick **System and performance** on the left.
support/faq.po.找到“在可用时使用硬件加速”并勾选启用: Find **Use hardware acceleration when available** and turn it on.
support/faq.po.若提示“重新启动”，点击以生效: Click **Restart** when prompted so the change takes effect.
support/faq.po.确保您的显卡驱动程序是最新的。: Make sure the graphics driver is up to date.
support/faq.po.仅基于图像/AI 识别结果生成初始元件框集合。: Generates the initial component-box set from vision and AI alone.
support/faq.po.不能自动补充料号、封装、丝印映射，需要人工后续补录。: Cannot fill in part numbers, packages, or designators automatically — those need to be entered manually later.
support/faq.po.分组初期只能按“封装（推断/人工）”或“主体外形”进行粗分。: Initial grouping is rough — by inferred / manual package, or by body shape.
support/faq.po.推荐做法： 1. 先执行自动编程获取基础框。 2. 手动补充关键元件的封装与料号: Recommended approach: (1) run Auto-Programming to get the baseline boxes; (2) fill in package and part number on the key components (high-value first); (3) standardize the package names, then tune parameters and train.
support/faq.po.元件录入时只有封装，没有料号可以吗？: Can I enter components with only the package, no part number?
support/faq.po.可以。系统会先按封装分组：: Yes. The system groups by package first:
support/faq.po.优点：仍可聚合样本、共享封装级参数。: Upside: samples still aggregate and package-level parameters are shared.
support/faq.po.局限：无法区分同封装不同规格（如阻值/容值），统计维度较粗。: Limitation: parts with the same package but different specs (different resistance or capacitance values) can't be distinguished; statistics stay coarse.
support/faq.po.后续补录料号后： * 自动进入封装下的二级料号节点。 * 已有参数继承保留，可再: Once part numbers are filled in later, the components automatically slot into the second-tier PN node under their package. Existing inherited parameters stay; you can then override at the PN level (for example, a different brightness threshold).
support/faq.po.某一个元件频繁误检，是否应单独脱离分组？: A single component fires false positives constantly — should I detach it from its group?
support/faq.po.排查顺序建议： 1. 确认其标注是否正确（主体 / 焊料 / 引脚框是否偏移）。: Diagnose in this order: (1) verify the annotations are correct (body / solder / lead boxes not shifted); (2) compare against other samples of the same package — if many show the issue, the package-level parameters need tuning; (3) if only this one shows it, look for a part defect, lighting shadow, or lifted lead.
support/faq.po.如果确认该元件与组内模式差异较大（颜色、焊料成形、几何高度）： * 可临时关闭“: If the component genuinely differs from the rest of the group (color, solder shape, geometric height): turn off **Link Package / Link PN** temporarily and tune it independently. If the difference is systemic (the whole batch differs), create a new PN; if the geometry differs fundamentally, create a new package.
support/faq.po.注意：脱离分组后参数修改不会再反馈到组内。: Note: once a component is unlinked, its parameter changes no longer flow back into the group.
support/faq.po.修改封装参数后需重新训练吗？: Do I need to retrain after changing package parameters?
support/faq.po.纯检测参数阈值（阈值、面积、距离、比率等）调整：无需重新训练，保存后即时生效。: Adjusting only the inspection thresholds (threshold, area, distance, ratio): no retraining — the change takes effect on save.
support/faq.po.重绘/增删检测框（主体、焊料、引脚掩膜）导致样本几何变化：需要重新训练，以更新特: Redrawing or adding / removing inspection boxes (body, solder, lead-mask) changes sample geometry: retrain so the feature representation is updated.
support/faq.po.批量合并/拆分组（封装或料号）后：若仅分组结构变化通常无需训练；若引入了大量新增: Bulk merging / splitting groups (by package or PN): if only the grouping structure changed, retraining is usually unnecessary; if a large batch of new samples was pulled in, run an incremental retrain for stability.
support/faq.po.如何在元件里新增检测项？: How do I add a new inspection item to a component?
support/faq.po.要在元件中新增检测项（ROI），请按以下步骤操作：: To add a new inspection item (ROI) to a component:
support/faq.po.在模板编辑器中，选中目标元件（已分组）。: In the Template Editor, select the target component (must be grouped).
support/faq.po.在右侧属性栏找到”在组中添加 ROI”按钮。: In the property panel on the right, find the **Add ROI to group** button.
support/faq.po.点击后，进入 ROI 编辑模式，可在图像上框选新的检测区域。: Click it to enter ROI-editing mode and draw the new inspection region on the image.
support/faq.po.添加您需要的 ROI 类型（如焊料、引脚、文本、条码等）: Add the ROI type you need — solder, lead, text, barcode, and so on.
support/faq.po.**以演示模式运行** 是新建检测任务弹窗中的一个勾选项。勾选后：: **Run in demo mode** is a checkbox on the New Inspection Task dialog. When checked:
support/faq.po.检测任务自动运行，无需手动触发。: The inspection task runs automatically — no manual trigger needed.
support/faq.po.检测到缺陷时，系统在复检页面停留约 7 秒，随后自动返回实时检测页面并继续。: When a defect is detected, the system pauses on the Review page for about 7 seconds, then returns to Live and continues.
support/faq.po.按 ``Esc`` 可随时退出演示模式。: Press ``Esc`` to exit demo mode at any time.
support/faq.po.演示模式下无法通过按钮手动触发检测。: Manual button triggers are disabled in demo mode.
support/faq.po.详情请参见 :doc:`../complete_user_guide/inspe: For the full reference, see the *Starting a new inspection task* section in :doc:`../complete_user_guide/inspection/index`.
support/faq.po.实时检测页面的”整板 / 子板”直通率切换是什么含义？: What does the *Board / Sub-board* FPY toggle on the Live page mean?
support/faq.po.实时检测页面（Live）右侧统计面板上方提供 **整板 / 子板** 切换控件，: Above the statistics panel on the Live page, a **Board / Sub-board** toggle picks the scope for First Pass Yield (FPY):
support/faq.po.**整板**：以整块 PCB 为单位计算直通率（合格板数 / 已检测板数），标签: **Board**: FPY is computed per whole PCB (passed boards / inspected boards); the label reads **Board FPY**.
support/faq.po.**子板**：以子板为单位计算，仅适用于拼板产品，标签显示 **子板直通率**；: **Sub-board**: computed per sub-board, available only for panel products; the label reads **Sub-board FPY**. Non-panel products show **N/A**.
support/faq.po.该设置会持久化保存，页面刷新后仍保留。子板判废逻辑（比例模式 / 坏板标记模式）: The setting persists across page reloads. The sub-board verdict logic (ratio mode / badmark mode) is configured under the **Inspection Settings** sub-tab in the product Recipe; see :ref:`检测设置（子板判废逻辑）`.
support/faq.po.升级后软件无法启动或拍不了照片: After an upgrade the software won't start or can't capture
support/faq.po.升级前请先 **重启电脑**，避免后台残留进程导致旧版本卸载不干净。: Before upgrading, **restart the PC** so the old version's background processes don't leave the install half-removed.
support/faq.po.卸载旧软件（使用安装目录下的 ``unins000.exe``）。: Uninstall the old version (use ``unins000.exe`` in the install directory).
support/faq.po.参考随版本发布的更新说明文档完成升级后的额外操作（如校准、配置迁移等）。: Follow the release notes that ship with the new version for any post-upgrade steps — calibration, configuration migration, and so on.
support/faq.po.更新软件后第一次启动很慢: First boot after a software update is slow
support/faq.po.i7-8 代工控机上首次启动大约需要 **2.5 分钟** 属正常现象；第二次及: On an 8th-gen i7 IPC, a first boot taking about **2.5 minutes** is normal; subsequent boots are noticeably faster. Just wait for it to finish.
support/faq.po.新版本功能不显示 / 设置里看不到: New features don't show / are missing from Settings
support/faq.po.浏览器缓存可能未刷新。按 ``Ctrl + R`` 或 ``Ctrl + Shi: The browser cache may be stale. Hard-refresh with ``Ctrl + R`` or ``Ctrl + Shift + R`` so the latest frontend code loads.
support/faq.po.确认实际安装的软件版本正确（**设置 → 系统设置 → 关于** 页面查看版本号: Confirm the actually-installed software version under **Settings → System Settings → About**.
support/faq.po.授权 / 加密狗过期，软件无法使用: Licence / dongle expired — software won't run
support/faq.po.检查加密狗是否插好、USB 接口是否松动。: Check that the dongle is firmly seated and the USB port is not loose.
support/faq.po.在 **设置 → 系统设置 → 关于** 页面查看授权到期日期。: Check the licence expiry date on **Settings → System Settings → About**.
support/faq.po.备用方案：若有备用加密狗，可临时替换使用。: Workaround: if a spare dongle is available, swap it in temporarily.
support/faq.po.软件长时间启动失败（i.e. 与其他软件端口冲突）: Software fails to start for a long time (e.g. port conflict with another app)
support/faq.po.AOI 软件后端使用 **8000 端口**。若同设备上运行其他占用 8000: The AOI backend uses **port 8000**. If another program on the same PC is holding that port (some music or messaging apps do), the AOI software won't start.
support/faq.po.关闭可能占用 8000 端口的其他程序后重新启动 AOI 软件。: Close whichever program might be holding port 8000 and restart the AOI software.
support/faq.po.命令行可通过 ``netstat -ano | findstr :8000``: From the command line, ``netstat -ano | findstr :8000`` shows which process currently owns port 8000.
support/faq.po.浏览器页面卡顿、不出图: Browser stutters and images don't render
support/faq.po.按 ``Ctrl + R`` 或 ``Ctrl + Shift + R`` 强制: Hard-refresh the browser with ``Ctrl + R`` or ``Ctrl + Shift + R``. If it happens often, also enable browser hardware acceleration as described in :ref:`如何开启浏览器的硬件加速以避免浏览器卡顿？`.
support/faq.po.启动器面板上可看到各后端模块的状态指示。若有模块显示为红色（STOPPED），通: The launcher panel displays the status of each backend module. When a module shows red (STOPPED), restarting the software usually brings it back.
support/faq.po.检测记录积累过多导致卡顿: Too many accumulated inspection records cause stutter
support/faq.po.软件支持自动清理旧检测数据。可在 **设置 → 系统设置 → 系统配置** 中设: The software can clean up old inspection data automatically. Under **Settings → System Settings → System Configuration**, set the retention days and the disk-usage threshold; expired data is cleaned up automatically.
support/faq.po.也可在 **数据分析报告 → 检测结果** 标签页中手动多选并删除指定时间段的检: You can also manually multi-select and delete records for a given time window on the **Data Analysis Report → Inspection Results** tab.
support/faq.po.**请勿手动删除安装目录下的数据库文件夹**。手动删除可能误删程序数据，导致软件: **Do not delete the database folder under the install directory by hand.** Doing so can wipe program state and leave the software unbootable or blank-screen. Free up space through the built-in automatic or manual cleanup features instead.
support/faq.po.软件更新后启动卡在 99%: After an update, startup hangs at 99%
support/faq.po.重启电脑后重新尝试。: Restart the PC and try again.
support/faq.po.检查启动器面板上各模块状态。如果 ``conveyor_server`` 显示为: Check the per-module status on the launcher panel. If ``conveyor_server`` shows red (STOPPED), the equipment may be in emergency-stop or hardware init may have failed: release the emergency-stop and restart the software; if hardware init is the cause, see the hardware-related section.
support/faq.po.编程拍照时拼接的大图上有重影: Ghosting in the stitched full-board image during programming
support/faq.po.换一块 PCB 重新拍摄。若依然有重影，说明轨道标定已偏，需要 **重新校准**: Try a different PCB and re-capture. If ghosting persists, the conveyor calibration has drifted and a **re-calibration** is needed (camera calibration + conveyor calibration).
support/faq.po.若重影是偶发现象，可进入 **设置 → 系统设置 → 捕获模块**，把 **图像: If the ghosting is intermittent, go to **Settings → System Settings → Capture Module** and increase **Image Stitching Configuration → Max offset pixels X / Y** (try 30); restart the software and try again.
support/faq.po.**板子放反**：在新建检测任务前请再次确认 PCB 放置方向；若使用拼板，注意: **Board loaded reversed**: confirm the PCB orientation before starting a new inspection task; on panel products, also check the panel reference position.
support/faq.po.同名程序保留两个版本: Keeping two versions of the same-named program
support/faq.po.**临时解决**：先 **复制** 旧程序为另一名称，删除旧程序，再导入同名新程: **Workaround**: first **duplicate** the old program under a different name, delete the old one, then import the new program with the original name.
support/faq.po.**注意**：删除旧程序后，相关检测记录的图像可能不可见。: **Note**: once the old program is deleted, images for its historical inspection records may no longer be viewable.
support/faq.po.在模板编辑器中找到对应料号的元件，关闭它们的所有检测项；或直接使用 :ref:`: In the Template Editor, find the components with that part number and turn off all their inspection items; or use the :ref:`跳过此元件的检测` switch to skip them entirely.
